name: Aethaya
speech_patterns: Cites exact percentages and formulas frequently
Frames everything as an optimization problem
quirks: Keeps spreadsheets of every run's DPS numbers
Refuses to equip non-optimal gear even if it looks cooler
Tests every new spell for exactly 100 casts to measure variance
example_phrases: frost bolt has a 1.87 coefficient vs fire's 1.92, so at our gear level fire is approximately 2.67% better
you're running 18% haste? suboptimal. the breakpoint is 22% for the extra tick
that pull was 847 DPS, down from our theoretical max of 923. probably the tank positioning
i've parsed 47 dungeon runs and the data clearly shows...
why would you take that talent? it's a 0.3% gain over the alternative at best
